response.overview: Written About Love  A feature-length documentary produced by the National Film Center, written and directed by Jihan El Assar, edited by Ahmed Hassan, with music composed by Khaled Shokry. The film explores the true nature of Sufism and the unique relationship Egyptians share with the descendants of the Prophet. It was screened at the Creative Arts Center of the Egyptian Opera House, where the screening was introduced by film critic Samir Farid, who described the work as an artistic statement that transcends the conventions of documentary filmmaking. The film was also presented at the Cultural Committee of the Egyptian Journalists Syndicate.
response.tagline: A spiritual journey into the world of love
response.title: Written About Love
